title: β-Galactosidase staining
steps: Prepare 20 µm OCT-embedded sections by cryosectioning.
Perform β-Gal staining on both cells and sections according to the manufacturer’s instructions.

Acquire images: Use a Leica DM750 brightfield microscope with a 40×/0.4 numerical aperture objective for cells. Use an EVOS M7000 Imaging System with a 20×/0.4 numerical aperture for tissue and organoid sections.
Refix sections with the fixation solution provided in the staining kit.
Mount sections on Epredia‱ SuperFrost‱ Plus slides (Fisher Scientific).
Fix cells with the fixation solution provided in the Senescence β-Galactosidase Staining Kit (Cat. number 9860; Cell Signaling Technology).
creator: Federico Bertoli
